Title: TC-3.2-F01: should display form builder with Location and Entity static fields

Step Action: Click 'Build Form' on a request type row.
System displays the Form Builder page.
Step Expected: Form Builder displays with two static fields pre-added: Location (Map field) and Entity (Dropdown list field).

Title: Check to save request (or create new version) form with any invalid controls

Step Action: Click 'Build Form' on a request type row.
System displays the Form Builder page.
Drag and drop fields and in properties -> select any invalid data.
Press on save button or new version button.
Step Expected: Error displayed: The form has invalid controls.

Title: TC-3.2-F02: should allow drag and drop of custom fields into form (drag and drop main and advanced fields)

Step Action: Open Form Builder for a request type.
Drag more than 1 field from (main fields) and more than 1 field (advanced fields) from the field palette.
Drop it into the form canvas.
Step Expected: Text field is added to the form canvas. Field properties panel is available for configuration.

Title: TC-3.2-F03: should set "Can Be Filtered By" property on text field then disable it

Step Action: Repeat with the other fields: Numeric, Date, Checkbox, Radio button, Dropdown list
Disable the option of "can be filtered by" and check that this option removed from assignment page.
Repeat with fields other than the fields mentioned in step 5.
Step Expected:
1- Property is saved. Field will appear as a filter option in the Assignment page (UC-3.10).
2- Property is saved. Field will not appear as a filter option in the Assignment page.
3- Other than the fields mentioned in step 5, this option will not be displayed.

Title: TC-3.2-F04: should set "Can Be Sorted By" property on numeric field

Step Action: Repeat with the other fields: Text, Date, Checkbox, Radio button, Dropdown list
Disable the option of "can be sorted by" and check that this option removed from assignment page.
Repeat with fields other than the fields mentioned in step 5.
Step Expected:
1- Property is saved. Field will allow sorting (ascending and descending ) in the Assignment page (UC-3.10).
2- Property is saved. Field will not allow sorting (ascending and descending ) in the Assignment page (UC-3.10).
3- Other than the fields mentioned in step 5, this option will not be displayed.

Title: TC-3.2-F05: should set "View With Request Information - Tablet" property

Step Action: Select a field (not Wizard step or Checklist Item).
Then try to select wizard step and checklist.
Then disable View With Request Information - Tablet for any field.
Step Expected:
1- Property is saved. Field value will display in the Request Details tab on Tablet (UC-5.1).
2- This option will not be displayed for wizard step nor checklist.
3- Property is saved. Field value will not be displayed in the Request Details tab on Tablet (UC-5.1).

Title: TC-3.2-F06: should set "View With Request Information - Assignment" property

Step Action: Select a field (not Wizard step or Checklist Item).
Then try to select wizard step and checklist.
Then disable View With Request Information - Assignment for any field.
Step Expected:
1- Property is saved. Field value will display in Request Info on the Assignment page (UC-3.10).
2- This option will not be displayed for wizard step nor checklist.
3- Property is saved. Field value will not be displayed in the assignment page.

Title: TC-3.2-F07: should allow editing static field properties except locked Entity properties

Step Action: Verify locked properties: Binding key, JSON, Options type (Default "Internal lookup") , Options list (Default "Entities") , Accept others (Default unselected), Contains All (Default unselected).
Step Expected: Locked properties are disabled/read-only. Other properties (label, required, etc.) are editable.

Title: TC-3.2-F08: should save form and redirect to list with success message

Step Expected: Success message displayed. System redirects to Request Types list.

Title: TC-3.2-F09: ALT001 - should create new version when editing form in use

Step Action: Open Form Builder for a form already in use (has request instances).

Step Expected: System creates a new version of the form. Old requests use old version, new requests use new version (BR05).

Title: TC-3.2-N01: BR02 - should not allow deleting both Location and Entity fields

Step Action: Attempt to delete the Entity field.
Step Expected: System prevents deletion. Error message indicates at least one of Location/Entity must exist.

Title: TC-3.2-N02: BR02 - should not allow making both Location and Entity non-mandatory

Step Action: Attempt to set Entity as not mandatory.

Step Expected: System shows validation error. At least one of Location/Entity must be mandatory.

Title: TC-3.2-I01: BR04 - Check after select "Entities" in options in Entity properties and confirm the values of entities should come from linked Entity Group

Step Action: In entities dropdown static field -> properties:
Save the form and activate it.
Create a link (UC-3.5) with Entity Group 'EG1'.
Open the Entity dropdown in the request form.
Step Expected: Entity dropdown shows only entities from the linked Entity Group 'EG1'.

Title: Check in case the form linked to 2 or more entity group

Step Action: In entities dropdown static field -> properties:
Save the form and activate it.
Create a link (UC-3.5) with Entity Group 'EG1'.
Create a link with EG2, EG3, ...
Open the Entity dropdown in the request form.
Step Expected: All entities linked to the same form will be displayed.

Title: TC-3.2-I02: BR05 - default version should be used for new Requests

Step Expected: New request uses the default (latest) form version 2. Old request retains version 1.

Title: Check that all properties are optional (Can Be Filtered By, can be sorted by, View With Request Information - Tablet and View With Request Information - assignment)

Step Action: 1- For all fields , don't select any of the properties: (Can Be Filtered By, can be sorted by, View With Request Information - Tablet and View With Request Information - assignment).

Step Expected: Should be saved without errors.

Title: Check to delete/ copy any field (except the 2 static fields)

Step Action: 1- In form builder, drag and drop one or more field.
2- Then delete one or more field.
3- Repeat when copy any field (except the 2 static fields).
Step Expected:
1- Should be deleted correctly and not displayed in WF.
2- Any field can be copied except the 2 static fields (location and entity).

Title: Check to preview the fields dragged and droped

Step Action: 1- In form builder, drag and drop one or more field.

Step Expected: All fields dragged and dropped will be displayed.

Title: Check to press on "delete" for all fields of the form

Step Action: 1- In form builder, drag and drop one or more field.

Step Expected:
1- All fields will be cleared except the 2 static fields.
2- The new version will only be saved with the 2 static fields.

Title: Check to press on "cancel" of adding/ editing the form

Step Action: 1- In form builder, drag and drop one or more field.

Step Expected: The added/ updated fields will be removed.
